title: Product Manager (Payment Network)
description:
You will support on leading and executing payment channel integration, configuration, and optimization projects.
Responsibilities:

  • Take ownership of payment channel integration and configuration, working with partners such as PSPs, banks, and e-Wallet providers.
  • Lead the execution of integration projects end-to-end — from requirement analysis, integration configuration, and testing, to go-live coordination.
  • Collaborate closely with internal product managers, engineers, and operation teams to ensure high-quality and timely delivery.
  • Review and validate integration data and configurations prepared by junior team members, providing feedback and support where needed.
  • Identify and troubleshoot issues related to payment channel performance, transaction success rates, or technical stability.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree or above.
  • At least 2 years of work experience in the payment, fintech, or internet industry with product management or payment integration responsibilities and 5 years for senior position
  • Excellent understanding of the global payment ecosystem — including card acquiring/issuing, eWallets, bank transfers, and local payment methods.
  • Excellent logical thinking, problem-solving, and data analysis skills.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects independently while guiding junior team members.
  • Excellent communication skills and cross-functional collaboration ability.
  • Hands-on experience with payment system design, transaction routing, or reconciliation processes is a plus.
  • Familiarity with global payment service provider (PSP), banking service providers, and local payment method ecosystems.

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
